interactions.summary: Jiang closes the Bronze Age unit, names Egypt, Mesopotamia, and the IVC as the three major Bronze Age civilizations covered, and says the next class will begin the Hebrew Bible.

claims.claim: Jiang closes the Bronze Age unit after covering Egypt, Mesopotamia, and the IVC, and previews the Hebrew Bible for the next class.
claims.temporal_scope: Course-structure note at the end of the 2024-12-03 lecture.

chronology_notes.note: The episode is positioned as the end of the Bronze Age unit and immediately before the course turns to the Hebrew Bible.
